message:
feat(syscall): add specialized syscalls and migrate 20 callsites

Add wrappers for name_to_handle_at, open_by_handle_at, fanotify_init,
fanotify_mark, seccomp, capget, capset, membarrier, io_setup/destroy/
submit/cancel/getevents, pkey_alloc/free/mprotect and migrate uses
in unistd_abi.rs. Reduced libc::syscall count 81→61 (25% reduction).

EPIC: bd-h5x

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
